generated_oml:
instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor measuring heatbed temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HeatbedTempDataTransmitted
]

instance AirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor measuring internal air temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirTempDataTransmitted
]

instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor measuring external ambient temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTempDataTransmitted
]

instance HeatbedTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor
]

instance AirTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirTemperatureSensor
]

instance AmbientTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from heatbed sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTempDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance AirTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from internal air sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirTempDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from external ambient sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTempDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 2 parameters for air temperature prediction using uniform distribution"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 4 parameters including heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance ScipyCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy-based non-linear least squares optimization for model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine using calibrated thermal models for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker on Raspberry Pi for data transport between physical sensors and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService, SimulationService, RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance OneWireBusProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol for communication with DS18S20 temperature sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms to update model parameters based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelParameters
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based temperature prediction using Model A and Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyAlertInsight, AdjustControllerParameters
]

instance CalibratedModelParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated thermal model parameters from calibration process"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted air and heatbed temperatures for operational adjustments"
]

instance SafetyAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts when temperature exceeds safe thresholds"
]

instance AdjustControllerParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust bang-bang controller parameters LL, UL, H, C based on model updates"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system management and communication"
]

instance ActuatorControlPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuator control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "12V/24V power supply for heatbed and fan"
]

instance InsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB for thermal regulation"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO for air circulation"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains InsulatedContainer, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, RaspberryPi4ModelB, ActuatorControlPCB, PowerSupply, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, AirTemperatureSensor, AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates them into GPIO signals for hardware control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system with RabbitMQ as communication backbone, low-level driver for hardware interaction, controller for logic execution, and simulation models; data flows via RabbitMQ between PT and DT components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; the DT integrates models into the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated against experimental data; Model B showed better thermal inertia prediction; calibration minimizes residual error via Scipy's non-linear least squares solver."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) for inter-component communication; 1-Wire bus for temperature sensors connected to Raspberry Pi GPIO."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hosting RabbitMQ server, controller, and low-level driver; on-premises deployment."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety; no specific cybersecurity measures detailed."
]
